productDisplayName: Wrangler Men American Flag Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and off-white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves, a full press-button placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with branding and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery This shirt from wrangler is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
